content: Per-package coverage gates enforced in CI and pre-commit: csvcontract/verify/transform 100%, jsoncontract/apicontract/supacontract 95%, pgcontract 85%.
Compare complete objects/contracts in tests, not individual fields. This catches missing fields and structural drift.
Race detector enabled on all test runs (-race flag). No exceptions.
pgcontract integration tests run against real Postgres 17 via Docker on port 5439. CI uses a Postgres service container.

name: pre-commit-check
description: Pre-commit hook runs make check (tidy, vet, lint, per-package coverage gates with individual thresholds, build). All must pass before commit.
